headline: Bluesphere Ventures Selects Stem for New York VDER Storage Advisory
summary: HOUSTON, May 13, 2026--Stem, Inc. (NYSE: STEM), a global leader in AI-enabled clean energy software and services, today announced that it has entered into a new services agreement with Bluesphere Ventures to support its portfolio of standalone battery energy storage projects participating in New York's Value of Distributed Energy Resources (VDER) program.
